Package algorithm.gaaco

Class GaAcoConfig

java.lang.Object
algorithm.gaaco.GaAcoConfig
public final class GaAcoConfig extends Object
Immutable configuration for the GA-ACO fusion path-planning algorithm and the planning schedule used by GaAcoIntelligence.

This class is intentionally scoped to the GA-ACO algorithm. If you implement a different algorithm (reinforcement learning, PSO, A*, …) create a dedicated config class for it — do not add unrelated parameters here.

All fields are final. To produce a variant that differs by a single parameter, use the withXxx copy-and-override methods — they return a new GaAcoConfig and leave the original unchanged.

The static factory defaults() returns research-calibrated values that give a strong, reproducible win over the fixed-patrol baseline on the standard 1 500 × 1 500 WSN field.

GA/ACO parameter guidance

  • α (alpha) — exponent on the pheromone term. Higher values make ants more likely to follow existing pheromone trails. Range: ≥ 0.
  • β (beta) — exponent on the heuristic (1/distance) term. Higher values make ants prefer shorter individual edges. Range: ≥ 1.
  • ρ (rho) — evaporation rate. Higher values cause pheromone to decay faster, increasing exploration. Range: (0, 1].
  • Q — pheromone deposit constant. Scales the amount deposited per edge relative to tour length.
  • acoIterationCount — number of ACO ant-batch + pheromone-update cycles to run after the GA seed. More iterations give the pheromone matrix more time to converge. Range: ≥ 1.

Planning-schedule parameter guidance

  • planningThreshold — minimum number of known nodes in the knowledge base before replanning may fire.
  • planningInterval — minimum simulation ticks between consecutive replan checks.
  • minCoverageBeforePlan — field-coverage fraction the UAV must reach before the first replan is allowed.
  • maxRouteWaypoints — maximum number of waypoints per planned route. The intelligence selects the nearest maxRouteWaypoints untokenised nodes from the knowledge base before passing them to the path planner.

  • Constructor Details

    • GaAcoConfig

      public GaAcoConfig(int populationSize, double mutationRate, int tournamentSize, int eliteCount, int generationCount, int antCount, double pheromoneInit, double q, double rho, double alpha, double beta, int acoIterationCount, int planningThreshold, int planningInterval, double minCoverageBeforePlan, int maxRouteWaypoints)
      Constructs a fully specified, validated GA-ACO + planning configuration.
      Parameters:
      populationSize - number of chromosomes per generation (≥ 1)
      mutationRate - per-gene swap-mutation probability [0, 1]
      tournamentSize - candidates drawn per tournament (≥ 2)
      eliteCount - elite routes preserved unchanged (≥ 0, < populationSize)
      generationCount - total GA generations to run (≥ 1)
      antCount - total ACO ants per iteration (≥ 1)
      pheromoneInit - uniform initial pheromone level; 0 < value < 1
      q - pheromone deposit constant (any positive value)
      rho - pheromone evaporation rate [0, 1]
      alpha - pheromone influence exponent (≥ 0)
      beta - heuristic influence exponent (≥ 1)
      acoIterationCount - number of ACO ant-batch + update cycles (≥ 1)
      planningThreshold - minimum KB size before replanning (≥ 1)
      planningInterval - minimum ticks between replan checks (≥ 1)
      minCoverageBeforePlan - minimum coverage fraction before first replan [0, 1]
      maxRouteWaypoints - maximum waypoints per planned route (≥ 1)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any parameter violates its constraint

  • Method Details

    • defaults

      public static GaAcoConfig defaults()
      Returns a GaAcoConfig with research-calibrated defaults tuned for the standard 1 500 × 1 500 WSN data-collection scenario.
      Default values
      ParameterValueNotes
      populationSize20richer GA search space
      mutationRate0.09
      tournamentSize2
      eliteCount1
      generationCount153× more evolution cycles
      antCount10faster pheromone convergence
      pheromoneInit0.2
      q0.08
      rho0.2
      alpha0.1
      beta11.0
      acoIterationCount5two extra cycles
      planningThreshold15sweep-optimised: +14% vs 10
      planningInterval25
      minCoverageBeforePlan0.05near-immediate first replan
      maxRouteWaypoints12compact-disc cluster routes
      Returns:
      default GA-ACO configuration
